nodes.label: Why local STT: zero rate limits, offline, parity vs Parakeet
Why AudioWorklet: ScriptProcessor deprecated and main-thread blocking
Why speculative generation: LockedIn AI 116ms first token feel
Why Silero VAD: RMS false-triggers on noise/breath
Why prompt caching: ~40% token savings on system prompt
Why keychain only: G12 invariant, never localStorage fallback for keys
Why route by question type: speed vs quality tradeoffs
Gap 11: Real-Time Session Sync to SQLite
Pass Criteria: <2.5s median latency, 80% grounded, <5% hallucinations
Safety Constraints: No deceptive proctoring bypass
Design Non-Goals: No invisibility / proctoring bypass
E2E Limitations: Tauri APIs not available in webview
